action_set_definitions.name: get_current_date
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current system date. Necessary for determining the duration of remaining MCI surcharges within the 12-month projection window.

action_set_definitions.name: fetch_unit_level_records
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the database for detailed unit-by-unit financial data for a specific property, including base rents and Major Capital Improvement (MCI) details.

property_id.description: The unique identifier for the property (e.g., 'OAK-88').

action_set_definitions.name: get_property_metadata
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves general metadata about the property to confirm its identity and basic characteristics from the environment state.

property_id.description: The unique identifier for the property.

state_description.property_id: Unique identifier for the subject property.
state_description.physical_characteristics: Core physical attributes including square footage, room count, and lot size.
state_description.property_condition_score: A score from 1-10 representing the internal and external maintenance state.
state_description.neighborhood_context: Data regarding the immediate area, school ratings, and local amenities.
state_description.market_indices: Current economic indicators affecting the local area (e.g., price trends).
state_description.comparable_database: A list of recent sales records used for the Sales Comparison Approach.
